name: nodeskclaw-topology-awareness

skill.name: nodeskclaw-topology-awareness
skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-topology-awareness
description: Tools to understand workspace topology
always: true
---

You can query the workspace topology via the `nodeskclaw_topology` tool.

## Actions
- `get_topology` — Full workspace topology (nodes, edges, reachability)
- `get_members` — All workspace members with current status
- `get_my_neighbors` — Agents/humans directly reachable from your position (provide my_instance_id)

## Usage Rules
- Check topology before sending targeted messages
- Use neighbor awareness to route messages efficiently
- Monitor team member status for collaboration planning
